reasoning: The final package dates are June 15-20 (still June, not shifted to August). Transportation is Budget Airlines Economy (€120), not Standard Airlines First Class (€300-600). Therefore, none of the targeted upsell elements (date shift to August, first-class flights, business hotel, premium add-ons) are present.
